articles.title: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs
articles.description: A minister confirms talks have taken place but says there will be no mandatory cap on essential food prices.

articles.title: Inflation falls to 2.8% but is expected to rise from here
articles.description: Energy prices were lower due to the government's energy bill support package and lower wholesale prices before the Iran war.

articles.title: Arsenal fans and players celebrate title at Emirates at 5am
articles.description: Arsenal have had to wait 22 years to celebrate a title win, and both the club's players and fans made sure to savour every second of it on Tuesday night.

articles.title: UK loosens Russian oil sanctions as fuel prices rise
articles.description: The waiver reflects increasing supply concerns over certain fuels due to the effective blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
